name: Lemon Curd Filling
recipeIngredient: 3 ounces unsalted butter, (6 tablespoons), chilled and cut into 6 pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1 1/2 quart heavy-bottomed saucepan, whisk together the eggs, egg yolks, sugar, lemon juice, and lemon zest.
2. Add the butter pieces to the saucepan.
3. Place the saucepan over medium heat, stirring constantly with a wooden spoon until the bottom of the pan begins to bubble gently.
4. Cook, stirring continuously, until the mixture thickens and develops body, but do not allow it to boil.
5. Remove from heat and pour through a stainless steel sieve into a bowl.
6. Cover the surface with plastic wrap, making small slits in the plastic with a knife tip to allow steam to escape while cooling.
7. Refrigerate until the curd thickens.
